title: Sound, Sound The Clarion
content:
Sound, sound the clarion, fill the fife!
    To all the sensual world proclaim,
    One crowded hour of glorious life
    Is worth an age without a name.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter Scott (Sir) delivers a powerful performance in "Sound, Sound The Clarion"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
